hero.hero_slide_1_title: Engineering Excellence for a Sustainable Future
hero.hero_slide_2_title: Innovative Solutions for a Better Tomorrow
hero.subtitle: A leader in engineering, consulting, and design, we transform complex challenges into innovative opportunities for our clients and society.

blue.line1: From project ownership and project management to project engineering.
blue.line2: Imagine, Create, Realize the Future of Transportation.
blue.paragraph: Trusted partner for the design, construction and operation of sustainable and innovative transport infrastructure in France and internationally. For over three years, CEEB has been supporting public and private project owners in the transformation of their territories. We combine technical expertise, innovation, and a commitment to sustainability to deliver world-class rail and airport projects.

about.title: Our Multidisciplinary Expertise
about.content1: CEEB: Sustainable engineering at the service of the world
about.content2:
• CEEB has established itself as a key player in sustainable engineering and infrastructure internationally.
  • From rail and airport mobility to urban projects, we support our clients and partners at every stage of their projects, combining technical expertise and strategic vision.
about.content4:
• Our multidisciplinary teams provide services ranging from auditing and consulting to project management and operational support.
  • Through a comprehensive approach, we deliver reliable and innovative solutions, perfectly tailored to the specific challenges of each project.
about.content6:
• From strategic design to commissioning, CEEB leverages its expertise in technical studies, BIM, telecommunications, consulting, and auditing.
  • Each project is an opportunity to transform complex challenges into concrete and sustainable solutions, for high-performing and environmentally responsible infrastructure.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We support companies with tailor-made engineering, consulting, and project management solutions.

suseng.title: Sustainable Engineering
suseng.desc: Resilient and environmentally friendly infrastructure, integrating climate issues from the upstream phases.

infra.title: Infrastructure
infra.desc: Complete design, construction and maintenance of railway and airport infrastructure.

mobi.title: Mobility
mobi.desc: Integrated and intermodal transport solutions, from needs analysis to commissioning.

inter.title: International
inter.desc: Expertise adapted to international contexts with a presence on 5 continents.

urban.title: Urban planning
urban.desc: Integrated urban planning placing transport at the heart of sustainable territorial development.

stra.title: Strategic Advice
stra.desc: Strategic support to optimize investments and maximize returns.

corevalues.title: Our Core Values
corevalues.subtitle: Our core values guide our actions and define our identity as a company.  They reflect our commitment to excellence, innovation, partnership and social responsibility in all our projects and interactions.

corevalues1.title: Technical Excellence
corevalues1.subtitle: Recognized expertise in all areas of transport. Rigor and quality in every project. Constant innovation and continuous improvement.
corevalues1.desc: Technical leadership, quality-driven delivery and continuous innovation to meet project challenges.

corevalues2.title: Innovation & Sustainability
corevalues2.desc: Systematic integration of environmental issues. Cutting-edge BIM and digital solutions. Commitment to the ecological transition.

corevalues3.title: Partnership & Collaboration
corevalues3.desc: Multidisciplinary and integrated approach. Close collaboration with all project stakeholders. Sharing of knowledge and expertise.

corevalues4.title: Social Responsibility
corevalues4.desc: Commitment to territories and communities. Respect for safety and quality standards. Contribution to the local economy.

hero.title: Contact CEEB in Paris

strategic.title: Strategic location, seamless access
strategic.lead: Our Paris office is at the heart of the metropolitan transport network, ready to support every stage of your project.

proximity.title: Connected to major transport hubs
proximity.content: Minutes from RER, metro and regional trains, our office is easy to reach from Paris and its suburbs.

clients.title: Close to key clients
clients.content: Located near public transport authorities, operators and major infrastructure clients for fast collaboration.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure network access
infrastructure.content: Access to major road, rail and airport connections simplifies travel for teams and partners.

address.heading: Address

access.title: How to reach us
access.intro: Our offices are well connected by train, metro, tram, bus and road.

rer.title: RER
rer.content: RER A to Val-de-Fontenay station, a short walk from the office.

metro.title: Metro
metro.content: Line 1 metro provides direct access to the business district.

tram.title: Tram
tram.content: Tram T1 stops near the office for quick east-west travel.

bus.title: Bus
bus.content: Several bus lines serve the nearby station and main avenues.

car.title: By car
car.content: Easy motorway access and nearby parking options make site visits simple.

bike.title: By bike
bike.content: Bicycle paths and secure parking support active commuting.

future.title: Future network
future.content: Planned transport upgrades will further strengthen our connectivity.

airports.title: Airports
airports.content: Paris airports are reachable in under one hour by train and road.

footer.description: A leader in engineering, consulting, and design for a sustainable future.

hero.title: About CEEB
hero.description: Founded in 1989, CEEB has been a trusted partner in major French infrastructure projects, bringing technical excellence and strategic engineering to transport and mobility programs.

pageHeader.title: About CEEB
pageHeader.text: Since 1989, CEEB has supported transport projects with multidisciplinary engineering, advisory services, and project management. Our story is built on innovation, experience, and a human-centered approach.

history.title: Our History
history.paragraph1: Founded on March 1, 1989 by GÃ©rard SEBAG, CEEB | European Concept Building Equipment began as a specialized engineering consultancy. From the outset, the company focused on delivering high-quality technical studies and practical solutions in infrastructure and transportation.
history.paragraph2: Over more than 35 years, CEEB has grown into a multidisciplinary firm with proven expertise in mobility, urban planning, systems engineering, and major public works. Our history is shaped by commitment to clients and by projects that strengthen territories and improve everyday life.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: Our mission is to guide clients from concept to commissioning, ensuring every project benefits from rigorous engineering, operational insight, and a strong sense of service.
mission.paragraph2: From early hand-drawn plans and Rotring pens to modern digital design tools and AI, we continue to evolve while maintaining a deep technical culture rooted in precision and reliability.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: Our values guide every step we take.

card1.title: Excellence
card1.desc: We maintain high technical standards in every study, design, and construction phase, aiming for solutions that are robust, practical, and future-ready.

card2.title: Innovation
card2.desc: We continuously explore new methods and technologies to deliver smarter infrastructure and engineering services that answer changing mobility needs.

card3.title: Sustainable Development
card3.desc: We take a responsible approach focused on durability, environmental performance, and social impact for long-lasting projects.

card4.title: Partnership
card4.desc: Our work is a human adventure built on integrity, transparency, and close collaboration with clients and stakeholders.

card5.title: Responsibility
card5.desc: We embrace the social and environmental dimensions of infrastructure to deliver safe, accessible, and resilient outcomes.

card6.title: Our Team
card6.desc: Our multidisciplinary experts combine engineering, project management, and operational know-how to support complex transport programs.

cta.title: Would you like to collaborate with us?
cta.text: Contact us to discuss your projects and how CEEB can deliver the engineering support you need.
